Package com.saperion.constants

Enum Class SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE>
com.saperion.constants.SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE>, Constable
Enclosing class:
SaFolderConstants
public static enum SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE extends Enum<SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE>
Folder types. Do not use valueOf directly, the method is safely wrapped by getTypeFromString.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getTypeFromString

      public static SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE getTypeFromString(String type) throws SaUnknownFolderTypeException
      Returns the folder type identified by the specified string.
      Parameters:
      type - type name
      Returns:
      folder type
      Throws:
      SaUnknownFolderTypeException - when the specified type is not known
